summary: Fixed Supabase persist 500 errors: createMessage() randomUUID + clientMessageId + created_at; persistMsg only sends schema columns; .gitignore .vercel

recentCommits: 5c4dbd5 Update session state: 405 root-cause found (VITE_API_BASE_URL in Vercel env set to Vercel URL, not Railway) (#5)
0ceb5ec Add shared apiUrl resolver, sendHadesChatMessage export, build smoke test (#5)
1ea242a Fix Vite env var injection: module-level try-catch with direct import.meta.env.VITE_* (#5)

tests.summary: Production fix — verified via Railway logs (no persist errors after deploy)

narrative: hades.service.js createMessage(): changed id from msg-${randomUUID().slice(0,8)} to randomUUID(); added clientMessageId field; changed createdAt to created_at to match DB column

conversationRepository.js: replaced custom createId('msg')/createId('conv') with randomUUID(); persistMsg now receives only {id, conversation_id, user_id, tenant_id, role, content, created_at} instead of full record spread

decisions.decision: Fix code to match existing schema instead of adding columns to hidemessages
decisions.rationale: Handoff explicitly forbids schema migration to hide code bugs. Table has id, conversation_id, user_id, tenant_id, role, content, created_at — send only those.
alternativesRejected: Add TEXT columns for suggestions/actions via SQL migration
decisions.tradeoff: App-layer fields (clientMessageId, suggestions, actions) not persisted. Acceptable for MVP — they're used for idempotency and UI hints, not data integrity.

decisions.decision: Use randomUUID() for message and conversation IDs instead of prefix-${random}
decisions.rationale: Supabase uuid column rejects non-UUID format strings like msg-a1b2c3d4.
alternativesRejected: Keep prefix format and change column type to TEXT
decisions.tradeoff: IDs are less human-readable but correctly typed.

tradeoffs: App-layer fields not persisted — clientMessageId/suggestions/actions are ephemeral in current architecture
improvements: createMessage() now uses proper UUID format
persistMsg only sends DB columns — no more column-not-found errors
risks: tenant_id still uses tenant_<uuid> format in authMiddleware — will cause persist errors on the tenant_id column. Already documented in handoff 012.
followUps: Handoff 012: App Login MVP + production routing + tenant_id UUID fix
